description_long: A stack of three fluffy, golden-brown pancakes sits atop a round, pastel pink plate with concentric ring patterns. The pancakes are thick and evenly layered, with a generous pat of butter melting on the topmost pancake. A glossy layer of syrup drapes over the butter and cascades down one side, pooling slightly on the pancake surface. Scattered around the stack and on the plate are several plump, deep blue berries, adding a pop of color and freshness. The plate is wide enough to catch any syrup or berries that might fall. The overall presentation is inviting and appetizing, suitable for a breakfast or brunch setting in an urban café or park.
description: A stack of three golden pancakes with melting butter, syrup, and blueberries sits on a pink patterned plate. The presentation is colorful and appetizing.
description_view_0: Front view shows the butter pat, syrup flowing to the left, and several blueberries on and around the pancakes.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the syrup pooling more centrally, with blueberries distributed around the stack and plate.
description_view_2: Syrup is seen cascading down the left side, with the butter pat and blueberries clearly visible on top.
description_view_3: The butter and blueberries are prominent on top, with fewer berries visible on the plate from this angle.
